meaning: adj.蛮横的,残暴的,无耻的,可恶的,令人不可容忍的
examples: By diplomatic standards, this was outrageous behaviour.
I felt as if I had made an outrageous howler.
Harambee Stars coach Mohammed Kheri has described the allegations as outrageous and pure madness.
Look at the words he's used: "outrageous", "intolerable", "inexcusable", and if you didn't get it, "wrong".
